title: stelis immersa
intro: Stelis immersa, also known as the Submerged Stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. As an orchid, it is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Stelis immersa has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin conditions, and it can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, for its medicinal uses.
